utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five items with appropriate details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health plus cost; property_coverage includes home/contents-like protections and cost; travel_coverage includes travel insurance elements and cost; additional_services includes enhancements with costs; total_budget includes monthly and annual breakdown. All items are fully specified with their relevant costs and coverage aspects.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three main components: (1) Health coverage provider 'LifeFirst' with plan name 'Standard Health Plan4', which corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under both physical and mental health categories. (2) Property coverage with business equipment, electronics, liability, and natural disaster protection—these features align most closely with 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' in the 'property_protection' section. (3) Travel coverage with medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage protection, delay compensation, and extended stay—these features match 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' in 'travel_insurance'. Additionally, the plan includes 'Adventure Travel Addon' and 'Wellness Programs' under additional services, which correspond respectively to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (in 'travel_enhancement_services') and 'Wellness Programs' (in 'health_enhancement_services'). Mapping each of these items to their ratings from the ground-truth data gives us the following: 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (health physical) = 9, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (mental health) = 4, 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' (property) = 9, 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' (travel) = 9, 'Adventure Travel Coverage' = 10, and 'Wellness Programs' = 3.
